reviews.feedback: Edge case testing instructions need to be more concrete — 'deny consent on the Google screen' isn't actionable in a dev environment. Should suggest using a test OAuth app or mock.
Just a file list with no motivation, no testing steps, no rollback plan. Useless for a reviewer.
Missing rollback plan, no reviewer guidance, testing instructions are just 'run npm test'.
Performance verification could be more concrete — specify an expected threshold, not just 'compare against baseline'.
18 files listed individually with no grouping. No motivation, no rollback, no reviewer guidance. Performance number buried in notes.
